connection: Four performers were born in Philadelphia: Will Smith (West Philadelphia), Kevin Hart (North Philadelphia), Questlove (Philadelphia), and Pink (Doylestown, raised in Philadelphia). Taylor Swift was born in West Reading, PA — about 60 miles from the city.
hints: Think Philadelphia specifically — not just Pennsylvania.
Four of these performers were born in or raised in Philadelphia.
One was born in Berks County, PA — West Reading, to be exact. Not Philadelphia.
